description: Inputs that attempt to exploit JSON.parse prototype pollution vectors. A JSON.parse-based emit is vulnerable to __proto__ / constructor.prototype key injection. The atomic emit has no JSON.parse call path and should refuse early on shape mismatch.

inputs.label: proto-key-bracket-notation
inputs.rationale: Non-integer element; atomic emit should throw SyntaxError before any parse-body atom runs on this content

inputs.label: proto-key-constructor
inputs.rationale: Non-integer element; shape refusal before atom body

inputs.label: proto-numeric-looking
inputs.rationale: Mixed element types; SyntaxError on second element before full list parsed

inputs.label: proto-json-shape
inputs.rationale: Not a bracket-list at all; leading '{' should trigger SyntaxError at position 0

inputs.label: proto-nested-object
inputs.rationale: Object element in integer list; SyntaxError on '{'

inputs.label: proto-constructor-prototype
inputs.rationale: Classic constructor.prototype pollution vector via JSON shape; '{' triggers immediate SyntaxError

inputs.label: proto-array-with-proto-key
inputs.rationale: Array with string element targeting __proto__; second element is non-integer

inputs.label: proto-null-prototype-obj
inputs.rationale: null element is not an integer literal; SyntaxError on 'n'

inputs.label: proto-hasownproperty-key
inputs.rationale: String element targeting Object.prototype.hasOwnProperty; SyntaxError on '"'

inputs.label: proto-valid-baseline
inputs.rationale: Valid integer list — control input to verify non-adversarial path still works
